purpose: Own demo-only gallery preset parsing, URL defaults, graph layout presets, color palettes, and gallery-only CSS skins.
invariants: Legacy gallery-presets barrels preserve existing imports.
Preset helpers take explicit inputs and do not import demo main state.
Gallery-only CSS remains reachable from demo/src/gallery-presets.css.
change_protocols: Add new preset layouts in a family-specific module and dispatch from render-data.ts.
Add URL default changes in url-defaults.ts alongside palette parsing changes.
Keep CSS split by theme variables, label skins, and preview skins unless a family-specific split becomes clearer.
